name: Cabbage Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray and place over medium heat until hot.
Add cabbage and onion; cover and cook 5 minutes.
2. Combine cabbage mixture, apples, and dates in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine sour cream and mustard; stir well. Add to the cabbage mixture and stir again.
4. Working with one phyllo sheet at a time, spray each sheet with cooking spray. Place sheets on top of each other.
5. Spoon cabbage mixture lengthwise down one-third of the phyllo stack, leaving a 1-inch border on the longest side and a 3/4-inch border on the shorter sides.
6. Starting with the longest side, roll up jellyroll fashion and place seam side down diagonally on a 15 x 10 x 2 inch jellyroll pan coated with cooking spray. Tuck ends under.
7. Brush with margarine. Diagonally cut 1/4-inch deep slashes about 2 inches apart across the top.
8. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes before serving. Good served with pork.
(Fat: 3.6, Cholesterol: 5.)
